summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Nyla Sales CRM application. All backend APIs and frontend features are working correctly with 100% test success rate.
passed_tests: Backend: Authentication for all 3 roles (admin, manager, sales rep)
Backend: Dashboard analytics endpoint returning correct metrics
Backend: Leads CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Backend: Role-based permissions (sales rep cannot delete leads)
Backend: Activities creation and retrieval
Backend: Comments creation and retrieval
Backend: Follow-ups creation, retrieval, and completion
Backend: Reports and analytics endpoints
Backend: Team management endpoints
Frontend: Login page loads with proper design
Frontend: Successful login and redirect to dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard displays all 4 metrics (Total Leads: 5, Conversion Rate: 20%, Pipeline Value: $405,000, Follow-ups Today: 1)
Frontend: Charts rendering correctly (pie chart and bar chart)
Frontend: Navigation to Leads page
Frontend: Leads table displaying with search and filter
Frontend: View lead detail page with all sections
Frontend: Add comment to lead successfully
Frontend: Navigate to Follow-ups page with calendar
Frontend: Navigate to Reports page with analytics
Frontend: Navigate to Team Management page
Frontend: Create new lead successfully
Frontend: Search functionality working

backend.authentication: All 3 user roles (admin, manager, sales rep) can login successfully. JWT tokens are generated and validated correctly.
backend.dashboard_analytics: Dashboard endpoint returns correct metrics: 5 total leads, 20% conversion rate, $405,000 pipeline value, 1 follow-up today, and proper status distribution.
backend.leads_management: Full CRUD operations working. Created test lead, retrieved all leads (6 total), updated lead status from 'new' to 'contacted', and deleted test lead successfully.
backend.role_based_access: Admin sees all 6 leads, Sales Rep sees only 4 assigned leads. Sales Rep correctly denied permission to delete leads (403 status).
backend.activities: Created activity for lead, retrieved 3 activities successfully.
backend.comments: Created comment for lead, retrieved 1 comment successfully.
backend.follow_ups: Created follow-up, retrieved 3 follow-ups, completed follow-up successfully.
backend.reports: Reports endpoint returns source analysis, team performance, and monthly trends data.
backend.team_management: Retrieved 3 users: Admin User (admin), Sales Manager (sales_manager), Sales Rep (sales_rep).

frontend.design: Clean, modern design following Nyla brand guidelines. Teal primary color (#0891B2) used consistently. Good spacing and typography. Sidebar navigation with all menu items visible.
frontend.dashboard: All 4 metric cards displayed correctly with proper icons and values. Pie chart and bar chart rendering correctly with proper colors and labels.
frontend.leads_management: Leads table displays all leads with proper columns (Name, Company, Email, Status, Priority, Created, Actions). Search input and status filter working. Add Lead button functional.
frontend.lead_detail: Lead detail page shows Contact Information, Lead Status with dropdown, Activity Timeline, and Comments section. All sections properly formatted.
frontend.comments: Comment input and Add Comment button working. Comments display with user name and timestamp.
frontend.navigation: All navigation links working: Dashboard, Leads, Follow-ups, Reports, Team. Sidebar highlights active page.
frontend.forms: Add/Edit Lead form has all required fields with proper labels and validation. Form submission redirects back to leads list with success toast.
frontend.follow_ups: Follow-ups page displays calendar component and upcoming follow-ups list.
frontend.reports: Reports page shows Lead Source Analysis with pie and bar charts, and Team Performance section.
frontend.team_management: Team page displays all 3 users in a table with Name, Email, Phone, Role, and Status columns.
